title: Merge Crypto   2048 Puzzle
description: Welcome to the joyful world of Merge Crypto. This game is an interesting and classic casual game where you can relax and kill time at any moment. The rules of Merge Crypto are extremely simple and easy to grasp. You just need to continuously combine balls of the same cryptocurrency until you reach the final goal of creating a Bitcoin Ball, which gives an increased score booster. Moreover, its a great way to train your brain and fingers, and its entertainment for all ages.
instructions: Swipe to aim at the ball of the same currency Release your finger to throw it Two balls merge into one larger one upon impact Dont let the balls accumulate beyond the warning line
